_note: All coordinates are in world space. Clients convert screen->world before sending. Client ID is never included in client->server packets — the server resolves it from the WebSocket connection. Entity IDs are never chosen by clients — the server assigns and broadcasts them.

resync._when: Sent in response to a client resync request — full current state

action_reject._when: Sent to the client whose action was rejected

place_track._when: Client places a track between two existing stations. Server assigns the ID and broadcasts it.

place_city._when: Client places a city. Server assigns the ID and broadcasts it.
place_city.name: Goonville

buy_train._when: Client purchases a train from a depot. Server assigns the train ID.

create_line._when: Client creates a new line between stations. Server assigns the line ID.

assign_train._when: Client assigns an existing train to an existing line.

ack._when: Sent every ~10 ticks so server can track client lag

resync_request._when: Sent when client detects a gap in received ticks
